mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenges ( host_id, title, description, category_id, entry_fee, verification_method, cert_frequency, daily_cert_limit, success_criteria_rate, ai_review_enabled, start_date, end_date, max_participants, status, cert_start_time, cert_end_time, feed_visibility ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{entryFee}, #{verificationMethod}, #{certFrequency}, #{dailyCertLimit}, #{successCriteriaRate}, #{aiReviewEnabled}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{maxParticipants}, #{status}, #{certStartTime}, #{certEndTime}, #{feedVisibility} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, host_id, title, description, category_id, entry_fee, verification_method, cert_frequency, daily_cert_limit, success_criteria_rate, ai_review_enabled, start_date, end_date, max_participants, status, created_at, updated_at, cert_start_time, cert_end_time, feed_visibility FROM challenges WHERE id IN
#{challengeId}

SELECT c.id, c.title, cat.name AS category_name, c.entry_fee, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p WHERE p.challenge_id = c.id AND p.status = 'ACTIVE') AS current_participants, c.max_participants, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.status FROM challenges c JOIN categories cat ON cat.id = c.category_id
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
